verdict.diagnosis: Fan-section degradation (DOC-2 §2) with multiple sensors indicating fan speed (s_8, s_13), bypass ratio (s_15), and core parameter shifts. RUL predictions indicate imminent failure (p10 RUL=1.1 cycles).
